summary: Backend-only regression for UD Catering MVP. Wrote 27 pytest tests covering auth (admin/manager/user login + /auth/me), branches CRUD + GST-only manager updates, categories/menu seeded data, users RBAC, bookings CRUD with TIME_CONFLICT (409 + detail.code) and ignore_conflict bypass, analytics summary, weather forecast, and settings logo upload. Found and fixed 1 backend bug: POST /api/users returned 500 due to MongoDB ObjectId leaking into the response. After fix, 27/27 tests pass.

critical.issue: Returned 500 'ObjectId is not iterable' because insert_one mutated doc and added _id; return statement only filtered out password_hash. Fixed: also exclude _id.

action_items: Bug fix already applied by testing agent in /app/backend/server.py (create_user response). Please review.
Consider similar audit: other endpoints that return the doc post insert_one (currently only create_user did this pattern; others build Pydantic models first, which is safe).
critical_code_review_comments: create_user returned dict built from doc after insert_one(doc) which silently injects _id (ObjectId). Pattern is unsafe — prefer constructing dict before insert or copying first. Fix applied.
Manager branch update silently filters out non-gst fields with HTTP 200 instead of returning 403/422 for forbidden fields. Works but is implicit; consider explicit reject for clarity.
/api/branches endpoint requires auth (uses get_current_user); login flow works fine but unauthenticated branch listing isn't allowed — intentional per design.
JWT_SECRET is read from env (good). CORS allow_credentials=True with potentially '*' default origins — combine cautiously in production.
Conflict detection only matches exact event_time string equality; doesn't account for overlapping time-ranges (acknowledged scope of MVP).
seed_data_creation: Used auto-seeded admin/branches/managers/staff/menu. Test data created during tests is prefixed TEST_ and cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py. All 27 tests pass against the live REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Re-running is idempotent (uses future dates, TEST_ prefixed customers, cleanup at end). Conflict response confirmed shape: HTTP 409 with detail={code:'TIME_CONFLICT', existing_id:'...'}. Frontend not tested per request.
rca of the issue: POST /api/users 500 RCA: motor's insert_one(doc) mutates the input dict, appending '_id' (bson.ObjectId). The handler returned `{k:v for k,v in doc.items() if k!='password_hash'}` which still contained _id. FastAPI tried to serialize ObjectId → ValueError. Reproduction: login as manager1, POST /api/users {username, password, role:'user'} → 500. Mitigation: exclude '_id' from the response dict (now done). Alternative: build the response dict from a clean dict before insert.
